DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS GRANTED IN PART: A. WITHIN TEN DAYS OF HEARING, DEFENDANT SHALL PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AS IDENTIFIED IN DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE REQUEST, EXCEPT FOR DOCUMENTS SUBJECT TO THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT AND ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE; B. WITH SPECIFIC REFERENCE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 11, DOCUMENT PRODUCTION SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE PERIOD 1/1/06 TO DATE OF INCIDENT. NO. 14, DOCUMENT PRODUCTION SHALL COVER THE PERIOD OF 5 YEARS PRECIDING THE INCIDENT. SANCTIONS DENIED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-06-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice O Fmotion And Motion From Relief From Waiver Of Objections;
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Warren Metlitzky, Deputy City Attorney, for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
Nicholas A. Carlin, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Laura Sample-Mattos

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for relief from waiver of objections granted. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Plaintiff Laura Sample-Mattos' Motion To Compel Attendance Of Defendant Rafael Lopez At Deposition And For Sanctions (Continued From 11/13/09)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nicholas A. Carlin, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Laura Sample-Mattos
Warren Metlitzky, Deputy City Attorney, for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

Hearing held on Plaintiff's motion to compel attendance of Raphael Lopez at deposition; and for monetary sanctions.
1- Motion to compel- off calendar, Moot.
2- Motion for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Plaintiff Laura Sample-Mattos'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents (Continued From 11/13/09)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nicholas A. Carlin, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Laura Sample-Mattos
Warren Metlitzky, Deputy City Attorney, f for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Plaintiff's motion to compel defendant City and County of San Francisco's production of documents granted in part:
a. Within ten days of hearing, defendant shall produce all documents responsive to plaintiff's request for production of documents, as identified in defendant's response to the request, except for documents subject to the attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. With specific reference to request for production no. 11, document production shall be limited to the period 1/1/06 to date of incident.
No. 14, document production shall cover the period of 5 years preciding the incident.
Sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Plaintiff Laura Sample-Mattos' Motion To Compel Attendance Of Defendant Rafael Lopez At Deposition And For Sanctions (Continued From 11/13/09)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Continued To Nov-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
